SEARCH
Package com.example.controller

Class PaymentController

java.lang.Object
com.example.controller.PaymentController
@RestController @RequestMapping("/payment") public class PaymentController extends Object
Controller for handling payment-related operations.

  • Constructor Details

    • PaymentController

      public PaymentController()

  • Method Details

    • status

      @GetMapping("/status") public String status()
      Health check endpoint to verify if the payment service is running.
      Returns:
      A message indicating the service status.

    • addCreditCard

      @PostMapping("/addcard") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<CreditCard> addCreditCard(@RequestBody CreditCard creditCard)
      Endpoint to add a new credit card.
      Parameters:
      creditCard - The credit card details to be added.
      Returns:
      ResponseEntity containing the created CreditCard and HTTP status.

    • initiatePayment

      @PostMapping("/initiate") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Transaction> initiatePayment(@RequestBody PaymentRequest request)
      Endpoint to initiate a payment transaction.
      Parameters:
      request - The payment request containing card details and amount.
      Returns:
      ResponseEntity containing the initiated Transaction.

    • verifyOtp

      @PostMapping("/verify") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Transaction> verifyOtp(@RequestBody OtpVerificationRequest request)
      Endpoint to verify an OTP for a payment transaction.
      Parameters:
      request - The request containing transaction ID and OTP.
      Returns:
      ResponseEntity containing the verified Transaction.

    • updateCreditCard

      @PutMapping("/updatecard") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<CreditCard> updateCreditCard(@RequestBody CreditCard creditCard)
      Endpoint to update a credit card's information.
      Parameters:
      creditCard - The updated credit card details.
      Returns:
      ResponseEntity containing the updated CreditCard.

    • deleteCreditCard

      @DeleteMapping("/deletecard/{cardNumber}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Void> deleteCreditCard(@PathVariable String cardNumber)
      Endpoint to delete a saved credit card.
      Parameters:
      cardNumber - The credit card number to delete.
      Returns:
      ResponseEntity with status of deletion.

    • getAllCreditCards

      @GetMapping("/allcards") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<List<CreditCard>> getAllCreditCards()
      Endpoint to get all stored credit cards.
      Returns:
      ResponseEntity containing the list of credit cards and HTTP status.

    • refundPayment

      @PostMapping("/refund") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Transaction> refundPayment(@RequestBody String transactionId)
      Endpoint to process a refund for a payment transaction.
      Parameters:
      transactionId - The ID of the transaction to be refunded.
      Returns:
      ResponseEntity containing the refunded Transaction.

    • getTransactionHistory

      @GetMapping("/history/{cardNumber}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<List<Transaction>> getTransactionHistory(@PathVariable String cardNumber)
      Endpoint to get the transaction history for a specific credit card.
      Parameters:
      cardNumber - The card number to fetch transaction history for.
      Returns:
      ResponseEntity containing the list of transactions.

    • setupRecurringPayment

      @PostMapping("/recurring") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<String> setupRecurringPayment(@RequestBody RecurringPayment request)
      Endpoint to set up recurring payments for a credit card.
      Parameters:
      request - The payment request with details about the recurrence.
      Returns:
      ResponseEntity containing the recurring payment details.

    • getTransactionStatus

      @GetMapping("/status/{transactionId}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<String> getTransactionStatus(@PathVariable String transactionId)
      Endpoint to check the status of a specific payment transaction.
      Parameters:
      transactionId - The transaction ID to check.
      Returns:
      ResponseEntity containing the transaction status.

    • cancelTransaction

      @PostMapping("/cancel/{transactionId}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<String> cancelTransaction(@PathVariable String transactionId)
      Endpoint to cancel a pending transaction.
      Parameters:
      transactionId - The ID of the transaction to cancel.
      Returns:
      ResponseEntity indicating success or failure of the cancellation.

    • fraudCheck

      @GetMapping("/fraud-check/{transactionId}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Boolean> fraudCheck(@PathVariable String transactionId)
      Endpoint to check for potential fraud in a transaction.
      Parameters:
      transactionId - The transaction ID to check for fraud.
      Returns:
      ResponseEntity indicating whether fraud is suspected.

    • topupCreditCard

      @PutMapping("/topupcard") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<CreditCard> topupCreditCard(@RequestBody TopUpRequest topUpRequest) throws Exception
      Throws:
      Exception
